final:
module top_module (
        input s,
        input t,
        input u,
  wire temp1_( ~s & ~t & u ) |
				( ~s & t & u ) |
				( s & ~t & ~u ) = ( ~s & ~t & u ) |
				( ~s & t & u ) |
				( s & ~t & ~u );
  wire temp2_( s & t & ~u ) = ( s & t & ~u );
  assign k = temp1_( ~s & ~t & u ) |
				( ~s & t & u ) |
				( s & ~t & ~u ) | temp2_( s & t & ~u ) ;

endmodule
